title: Lantern Market
scene: A narrow market street with hanging lanterns, awnings, stalls, side alleys, layered building fronts, and a central walkway through the scene.
midpointPrompt: A narrow market street with hanging lanterns, awnings, stalls, side alleys, layered building fronts, and a central walkway through the scene. Mixed old and contemporary storefront details, clear readable depth, and balanced late-afternoon light.

xAxis.negativePrompt: rough stone walls, timber-framed upper stories, canvas stall roofs, hand-painted wooden signs, iron lantern brackets, stacked barrels and crates
xAxis.positivePrompt: glowing neon shop signs, glass storefront windows, brushed metal frames, illuminated panels, sleek awnings, glossy contemporary street fixtures

yAxis.negativePrompt: dry pale paving stones, crisp shadows, clear air, dry canvas awnings, dust on stall fronts

title: Greenhouse Laboratory
scene: A plant laboratory greenhouse with benches, labeled pots, glass walls, irrigation lines, tools, and dense greenery around a central aisle.
midpointPrompt: A plant laboratory greenhouse with benches, labeled pots, glass walls, irrigation lines, tools, and dense greenery around a central aisle. Lightly worn surfaces with a few marks, coherent non-photographic visual study with realistic space and visible hand-rendered treatment.

xAxis.negativePrompt: spotless glass panes, tidy benches, scrubbed tools, clean labeled pots, fresh white trays, swept central aisle
xAxis.positivePrompt: grimy glass panes, stained benches, dirty tools, soil spills, algae streaks, dark residue around pots and irrigation lines

yAxis.negativePrompt: warm sunlight through the glass roof, golden highlights on leaves, natural shadows, open vents, no colored lamps

title: Abstract Modern Composition
scene: An abstract modern art composition with soft curves, angled planes, layered marks, visible edges, and a balanced central structure.
midpointPrompt: An abstract modern art composition with soft curves, angled planes, layered marks, visible edges, and a balanced central structure. Moderate surface density, balanced line and color, neither sparse nor heavily decorated.

xAxis.negativePrompt: large unbroken color fields, sparse shapes, broad empty margins, few lines, quiet open composition
xAxis.positivePrompt: dense decorative motifs, intricate pattern tiles, fine repeated dots and curls, layered borders, many small marks

yAxis.negativePrompt: black ink on white paper, crisp contour lines, crosshatching, brush-pen strokes, visible dry ink edges

title: Library Reading Room

xAxis.negativePrompt: empty reading tables, rows of empty chairs, closed books, untouched aisles, still lamps, no visible readers
